case_title: SHOU H. YEAH VS. ALEXIS CHANTELLE VICTORIO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,900.00 FILED BY YEAH, SHOU H. AS TO DEFENDANT VICTORIO, ALEXIS CHANTELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEAH, SHOU H. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED NOV-29-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VICTORIO, ALEXIS CHANTELLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEAH, SHOU H. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VICTORIO, ALEXIS CHANTELLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF YEAH, SHOU H. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEAH, SHOU H.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2015 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT VICTORIO, ALEXIS CHANTELLE

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED
